text: Anas bin Malik said, “The head of A+ Huain) was brought to ‘Ubeiculah bin Ziyad and was put in atray, and then Ibn Ziyad started playing with a sfick at the nose and mouth of AkHusain's head and saying something about his handsome features.* Anas then said (to him), *Al-Hilsii resembled the Prophet more than the ofhers did.* Anas added, “His (ie. AHusain's) hair ‘was dyed with Wasma 1. a kind of plant used as a dye). [P PR Ta———
